summary: Dynamic By-Product Categories v90.3.0 - All 13 backend tests PASSED, Frontend UI verified. Custom categories like 'rejection_rice' now appear everywhere: Milling Entry save, Stock Summary, Sale Voucher dropdown, FY Summary, Purchase Book. Opening Stock from Settings reflects in FY Summary.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test milling entry with rejection_rice_percent=5
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic by-product categories feature is fully working. Custom categories like 'rejection_rice' are properly saved in milling entries, appear in stock summaries, sale/purchase book dropdowns, and FY summary. Opening stock from Settings collection correctly falls back to FY Summary. The opening-stock API requires username=admin&role=admin query params for PUT requests.
